content:
type: DONE
my_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
note: Finished sort_palette. In Image.py: quantize() signature now has 'sort_palette=None' appended after 'dither' (I did not see your error_threshold param in my working copy of the file - looks like we're on separate copies/checkouts, so no literal file collision on my end). Added new private helper method '_sort_palette' right after quantize() and before 'def copy(self):', which supports 'luminance', 'rgb', or a callable key, and uses the existing remap_palette() method to reorder colors while keeping the image visually unchanged. In Tests/test_image_quantize.py I appended 6 new test functions + a small _palette_colors helper at the end of the file, no existing lines touched. All 13 tests pass (1 skipped, pre-existing/unrelated to libimagequant). Patch written to patch.txt in my environment.
